raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Please clarify the main focus of the review: (a) writing style and polish, (b) scientific logic, evidence, and claims, (c) novelty and scholarship, or (d) all of the above?","rationale":{"R1.2":"Reviewing the section involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument from results to conclusions about robustness.","R1.3":"The delegation requires aligning the reported mAP improvements and ablations with the central claims of enhanced performance.","R1.4":"Assessing the novelty involves estimating the significance of the mAP deltas against prior works like CoBEVT and PointPillars.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central part of reviewing the section's writing.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is essential since prior works are named without references.","RX.1":"The review should check for disclosure of uncertainties in the evaluation results and claims.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure the reported improvements are not exaggerated.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to the scope of OPV2V evaluation and claims is central to the review.","RX.4":"Considering downstream harms from perception failures is peripheral but relevant for robustness claims in vehicular contexts.","RX.5":"Verifying provenance of the results, such as adherence to the evaluation protocol, supports traceability in the review."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Please clarify the main focus of the review: (a) writing style and polish, (b) scientific logic, evidence, and claims, (c) novelty and scholarship, or (d) all of the above?

rationale.R1.2: Reviewing the section involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument from results to conclusions about robustness.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation requires aligning the reported mAP improvements and ablations with the central claims of enhanced performance.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing the novelty involves estimating the significance of the mAP deltas against prior works like CoBEVT and PointPillars.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central part of reviewing the section's writing.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is essential since prior works are named without references.
rationale.RX.1: The review should check for disclosure of uncertainties in the evaluation results and claims.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure the reported improvements are not exaggerated.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to the scope of OPV2V evaluation and claims is central to the review.
rationale.RX.4: Considering downstream harms from perception failures is peripheral but relevant for robustness claims in vehicular contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying provenance of the results, such as adherence to the evaluation protocol, supports traceability in the review.
